codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. All expected behaviors are covered: approve/reject/start_review actions with proper status transitions, notes validation for rejection, physical document guards, re-review support, and audit event creation. 7 comprehensive test cases verify all edge cases.

summary: The document-review-api feature was successfully implemented. The reviewDocument function in admin-documents.service.ts handles all three actions (approve→valid, reject→rejected, start_review→in_review) with proper validation. The VALID_TRANSITIONS map correctly restricts which status transitions are allowed. Rejection requires non-empty notes (trimmed). Physical-marked documents cannot be directly approved. Every review creates an audit_event. The oRPC endpoint documents.admin.review is properly wired in documents.router.ts with admin auth. BACKEND_STATUS.md was updated. All 7 test cases pass. No blocking issues found.
